Dexterity.description: Increases Block gained from cards by X.

Metallicize.description: At the end of your turn, gain X Block.

Plated Armor.description: At the end of your turn, gain X Block. Reduced by 1 when receiving unblocked attack damage.

Thorns.description: When attacked, deal X damage back.

Barricade.description: Block is not removed at the start of your turn.

Demon Form.description: At the start of your turn, gain X Strength.

Brutality.description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and draw 1 card.

Combust.description: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP and deal X damage to ALL enemies.

Corruption.description: Skills cost 0. Whenever you play a Skill, Exhaust it.

Dark Embrace.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, draw 1 card.

Evolve.description: Whenever you draw a Status card, draw X card(s).

Feel No Pain.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, gain X Block.

Fire Breathing.description: Whenever you draw a Status or Curse card, deal X damage to ALL enemies.

Juggernaut.description: Whenever you gain Block, deal X damage to a random enemy.

Rupture.description: Whenever you lose HP from a card, gain X Strength.

Rage.description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain X Block.

Flame Barrier.description: When attacked, deal X damage back.

Double Tap.description: The next X Attack(s) are played twice.

Vigor.description: Your next Attack deals X additional damage.

Energized.description: Gain X additional Energy next turn.

Intangible.description: Reduce ALL damage taken and HP loss to 1. Reduced by 1 at end of turn.

Buffer.description: Prevent the next X time(s) you would lose HP.

Blur.description: Block is not removed at the start of your next X turn(s).

Amplify.description: Your next X Power card(s) are played twice.

No Draw.description: You may not draw any more cards this turn.

Vulnerable.description: Take 50% more damage from Attacks. Decreases by 1 each turn.

Weak.description: Deal 25% less Attack damage. Decreases by 1 each turn.

Frail.description: Gain 25% less Block from cards. Decreases by 1 each turn.

Poison.description: At the start of its turn, loses X HP and Poison is reduced by 1.

Constricted.description: At the end of your turn, take X damage.

Entangled.description: You may not play any Attacks this turn.

Hex.description: Whenever you play a non-Attack card, add a Dazed to your draw pile.

Bias.description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 Focus.

Wraith Form v2.description: At the start of your turn, lose X Dexterity.

Ritual.description: At the end of its turn, gains X Strength.

Curl Up.description: On first attack received, gain X Block.

Angry.description: Whenever this enemy takes damage, gains X Strength.

Enrage.description: Whenever a Skill is played, gains X Strength.

Spore Cloud.description: On death, applies 2 Vulnerable to the player.

Malleable.description: Each time this enemy is attacked in one turn, gains increasing Block.

Sharp Hide.description: Whenever the player plays an Attack, takes X damage.

Minion.description: This enemy does not give rewards on death.

Split.description: When at or below 50% HP, splits into two smaller slimes.

Flight.description: Takes 50% less damage. Loses 1 stack when attacked. At 0, grounded.

Regen.description: Heals X HP at the end of its turn.

Mode Shift.description: After taking X damage, changes attack pattern.

Time Warp.description: After the player plays 12 cards, ends the turn and gains Strength.

Painful Stabs.description: Whenever this enemy takes unblocked Attack damage, adds a Wound to the player's discard pile.

Beat of Death.description: Whenever the player plays a card, takes X damage.

Invincible.description: Can only lose X HP per turn.

Unawakened.description: Has not yet entered second phase.

Curiosity.description: Whenever the player plays a Power, gains 1 Strength.

Life Link.description: If any of this group survive, revive to full HP at end of turn.

Stasis.description: This enemy is holding a stolen card.

Shifting.description: On losing HP, gains Block equal to the HP lost.

Reactive.description: When this enemy takes damage, it gains Intangible.
